examples: Economist Gus Faucher said lower unemployment and rising wages could give Americans more money to spend.
Gus lies asleep in his bunk.
No one else populated Gus Bingham's bar on the Saluda River.
Uncle Gus who still drives a Chevy Nova is talking about streaming movies on his iPad.
Sir Gus is retiring as the head of the civil service at the end of December.
